meaning: adj.立即的,直接的,紧迫的,刻不容缓的,(食品)速溶的,方便的,即时的
examples: For an instant I was infected by her fear.
For an instant, Barney was tempted to flee.
The engine delivers instant acceleration whatever the revs.
If ITT wins, Corning will be faced with instant competition from a knowledgeable well-financed tough competitor.
He had earlier built an instant-messaging client called Gaim, which has become popular among the open-source crowd.
